task: Parse an AWS S3 bucket name from a full S3 URI and extract only the bucket name
solution_criteria: Should correctly extract bucket names from various S3 URI formats (s3://bucket-name/key, s3://bucket-name, https://bucket-name.s3.amazonaws.com/key). Must handle hyphens and numbers in bucket names.

task: Convert an AWS CloudFormation template JSON object to include a new S3 bucket resource with versioning enabled
solution_criteria: Should produce valid JSON that adds an S3 bucket resource to the Resources section with VersioningConfiguration enabled. Must maintain proper CloudFormation syntax including Type, Properties, and logical ID.

task: Write a Python function that takes an AWS IAM policy document (as a dict) and returns a list of all the AWS service actions (e.g., 's3:GetObject') granted in that policy
solution_criteria: Should handle both single Action strings and Action arrays. Must extract all service:action combinations from all statements. Should return a deduplicated list of actions. Should handle wildcard actions like 's3:*' or '*'.
